title: ocimum pseudoserratum
intro: Ocimum pseudoserratum, also known as False Saw-leaved Basil, is a tropical plant species in the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Ocimum pseudoserratum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. Ocimum pseudoserratum is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
